message:
bench(core): recorder append-log and swarm-load regression profiles

storage_regression.rs (+264 lines):
- Group 6: \`bench_recorder_append_log_profile\` — measures raw
  append-log backend throughput across three swarm-shaped scenarios
  (8x32, 24x24, 48x16 pane×event matrices), timing batch append
  and health check latency per cycle
- Group 7: \`bench_recorder_swarm_load_profile\` — end-to-end
  ingest → index-health → lexical → hybrid query cycle under
  sustained swarm load, measuring:
  - Ingest throughput at each pane×event scale
  - Indexing lag (total_segments - total_fts_rows) to verify
    trigger-driven indexing keeps pace
  - Lexical vs hybrid query latency under ingest pressure
  - Semantic lane warm-keeping (every 4th pane's first event gets
    a synthetic embedding to exercise the hybrid path)
- Helper functions: \`append_log_config()\` for tempdir-based storage,
  \`bench_recorder_event()\` factory producing full RecorderEvent
  structs with deterministic IDs for reproducibility
- Four new budget assertions registered in BUDGETS for regression
  gate enforcement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
